title: myosotis alpestris subsp. albomarginata
intro: Myosotis alpestris subsp. albomarginata, also known as alpine forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Myosotis alpestris subsp. albomarginata include its potential to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
